calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Cynthia Taylor.
Default was entered against defendant on March 12, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 27, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant Cynthia Taylor as follows:

Defendant Cynthia Taylor is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards or any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Continued To Jul-13-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-16-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
